blockers.description: origin/master is 13 commits behind local master

human_actions_pending.context: 13 commits from sprint-4 execution are unpushed
Capture design decisions (hale/taro relationship, v2 formula) before they're lost

decisions.decision: Hale raises populationCap only -- no direct taro effect
decisions.rationale: Confirmed correct per design. Taro changes at End Turn via loi production and population consumption. No Sprint 4 requirement defined hale-to-taro.
v2 End Turn handler pre-increments state.turn BEFORE calling processTick. P3 prototype did not pre-increment -- the P3 formula is wrong for v2.

decisions.decision: SEASON_LABEL declared at module scope, not inside create()
decisions.rationale: Consistent with TERRAIN_TO_FRAME, TERRAIN_TO_TINT, BUILDING_TINT pattern. Required for updateHUD() to reference it without passing as parameter.

context_notes: Sprint 4 is 100% complete and verified. Three open questions for Sprint 5: (1) population growth trigger, (2) Carpentry Eureka placement handler vs processTick, (3) Pop 5/0 display oddity on game start.
